llm_eval.notes: Clear single purpose; idempotency via --force abort guard; secrets handled safely (only emits a template add-generic-password cmd, never reads real tokens); --print-keychain-cmd separated. Minor: EXAMPLE.read_text and template['databases']['skill-list'] etc. unguarded -> KeyError/OSError if example JSON malformed (repo-controlled, low risk); no PEP723 frontmatter.
